quotes: top wave layer at **70% transparency** over the base wave
Fluid wave forms in **two colorways**: **Sunshine/Gold** and **Sky Blue/Deep Blue**; each in **long and short** variants.
Construction: top wave layer at **70% transparency** over the base wave (Gold over Sunshine; Sky Blue over Deep Blue) — always preserve the layered, translucent quality.
Usage: alone, or overlaid on photography or gradient backgrounds; to support layout flow, frame content, or add depth.

rules.intent: Preserve the layered, translucent brand wave graphic style.
rules.rule_text: Fluid wave graphic elements must be constructed in two colorways: Sunshine/Gold and Sky Blue/Deep Blue, using long or short variants. The top wave layer must be set at 70% transparency (opacity.logo.gold = 0.7) over the base layer (Gold over Sunshine; Sky Blue over Deep Blue) to preserve a layered, translucent quality.

quotes: **Masthead gradient with logo mark** (Sunshine → 0C,10M,78Y,0K, logo mark placed at the lightest end) is the approved device for holding copy in masthead positions.
**Masthead gradient with logo mark** (Sunshine → 0C,10M,78Y,0K, logo mark placed at the lightest end) is the approved device for holding copy in masthead positions.

rules.intent: Maintain brand recognition and structural consistency in copy-holding masthead positions.
rules.rule_text: Masthead positions holding copy must use the approved masthead gradient device containing a gradient transition from Sunshine (color.primary.sunshine = #faa31b) to Gold (0C,10M,78Y,0K), with the logo mark positioned at the lightest end.
